creator: dewayne@heuristicsystems.com.au
text:
(In reply to Michael Osipov from comment #39)
I think you'll find that
man vfs_freebsd
is your friend.  Briefly, it is required for samba4 to run within a jail context, where I run multiple samba instances.  

Timur, issuing a samba-devel is a good idea.  Gets 416 out to the world, and we  can contribute with the extattr mappings.
